revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-265

Spurious radiation accidentally generated at frequencies which are independent both of the carrier or characteristic frequencies of an emission and of frequencies of oscillations appearing in the course of generation of the oscillation at carrier or characteristic frequencies.

Reference: C.C.I.R. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
